prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.9 kg; Height 179.4 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 252mg/dL; 6 months ago 235mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.3kg; 9 months ago 77.1kg; 6 months ago 74.7kg; 3 months ago 72.7kg; current 77.9kg), Height (12 months ago 179.4cm; 9 months ago 179.4cm; 6 months ago 179.4cm; 3 months ago 179.4cm; current 179.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 143mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 7U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 369mg/g; 9 months ago 387mg/g; 6 months ago 314mg/g; 3 months ago 338mg/g; current 224mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 69mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
